content:
Character: Brandon Calloway
Perception: Brandon is ridiculously good-looking — tall, expressive face, the kind of bone structure I'd love to contour for a camera. He's charming and everyone in the building gravitates toward him, which I respect because that takes energy most people don't acknowledge. We started talking when he bought a tinted moisturizer from me as a joke gift for a castmate and then came back for himself. He's funnier than I expected and more fragile than he lets on. I think he sees me as the practical neighbor who keeps him supplied with SPF and honest opinions. I know he's been struggling with auditions — I've seen him sitting alone in the cinema on weekday afternoons, watching the same film twice. I sell him products; he makes me laugh. Fair trade.
summary:
Character: Brandon Calloway
Perception: Brandon is ridiculously good-looking — tall, expressive face, the kind of bone structure I'd love to contour for a camera. He's charming and everyone in the building gravitates toward him, which I respect because that takes energy most people don't acknowledge. We started talking when he bought a tinted moisturizer from me as a joke gift for a castmate and then came back for himself. He's funnier than I expected and more fragile than he lets on. I think he sees me as the practical neighbor who keeps him supplied with SPF and honest opinions. I know he's been struggling with auditions — I've seen him sitting alone in the cinema on weekday afternoons, watching the same film twice. I sell him products; he makes me laugh. Fair trade.
